annotation: Glossary term: علی ابن ابی طالب علیہ السلام ('Ali ibn Abi Talib 'alayhi al-salam) — Ali ibn Abi Talib (peace be upon him)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Honorific reference to Imam 'Ali.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Wasi — Legatee; the rank that succeeds the Natiq in each prophetic cycle. Ali is the Wasi of Muhammad.

annotation: Glossary term: ناطق (Natiq) — Speaker (prophet of a cycle)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Natiq — Speaker; a law-giving prophet who opens a cosmic cycle. The Six Natiqs are Adam, Noah, Abraham, Moses, Jesus, Muhammad; the Seventh is the Qa'im.

annotation: Glossary term: رسول اللہ (ﷺ) (Rasul Allah (s.a.w.)) — The Messenger of Allah
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Prophet Muhammad — abbreviated salawat form.

annotation: Glossary term: اساس (Asas) — Foundation (Imam after the Natiq)
rationale: Curated glossary entry: Asas — Foundation; in Ismaili cyclical doctrine, an alternative title for the Wasi (Legatee) of a Natiq.

rationale: Curated glossary entry: Mustajib — the responder; an initiate who has answered the da'wa, the lowest rank of inducted believers.
